languages.text: "Этот спектакль Драйвстемы посмотрят, не выходя на сцену. Ювенна, милая, давайте позволим Инквизитору избавить наш стол переговоров от лишних лиц".

traits.locale_text: "Этот спектакль Драйвстемы посмотрят, не выходя на сцену. Ювенна, милая, давайте позволим Инквизитору избавить наш стол переговоров от лишних лиц".

languages.text: "The Drivestems shall observe this performance from the wings. Juvenna, my dear, let us allow the Inquisitor to clear any superfluous pieces from the board."
languages.original_text: "Этот спектакль Драйвстемы посмотрят, не выходя на сцену. Ювенна, милая, давайте позволим Инквизитору избавить наш стол переговоров от лишних лиц".

traits.locale_text: "The Drivestems shall observe this performance from the wings. Juvenna, my dear, let us allow the Inquisitor to clear any superfluous pieces from the board."
"The Drivestems shall observe this performance from the wings. Juvenna, my dear, let us allow the Inquisitor to clear any superfluous pieces from the board."
"The Drivestems shall observe this performance from the wings. Juvenna, my dear, let us allow the Inquisitor to clear any superfluous pieces from the board."

languages.text: “德莱夫斯塔家族在一旁看戏便好。尤文娜，我亲爱的，就让审判官大人先把棋盘上多余的棋子清一清吧。”
languages.original_text: "The Drivestems shall observe this performance from the wings. Juvenna, my dear, let us allow the Inquisitor to clear any superfluous pieces from the board."

traits.locale_text: “德莱夫斯塔家族在一旁看戏便好。尤文娜，我亲爱的，就让审判官大人先把棋盘上多余的棋子清一清吧。”

languages.text: « Les Drivestem se contenteront d'observer le spectacle sans intervenir. Juvenna, ma chère, laissons l'inquisiteur éliminer les pièces inutiles de l'échiquier. »
languages.original_text: "The Drivestems shall observe this performance from the wings. Juvenna, my dear, let us allow the Inquisitor to clear any superfluous pieces from the board."

traits.locale_text: « Les Drivestem se contenteront d'observer le spectacle sans intervenir. Juvenna, ma chère, laissons l'inquisiteur éliminer les pièces inutiles de l'échiquier. »

languages.text: "Drivestemler bu gösteriyi kulisten izleyecek. Juvenna, canım... Bırakalım Engizisyoncu, tahtadaki gereksiz taşları temizlesin."
languages.original_text: "The Drivestems shall observe this performance from the wings. Juvenna, my dear, let us allow the Inquisitor to clear any superfluous pieces from the board."

traits.locale_text: "Drivestemler bu gösteriyi kulisten izleyecek. Juvenna, canım... Bırakalım Engizisyoncu, tahtadaki gereksiz taşları temizlesin."

languages.text: «Los Drivestem observarán este espectáculo desde las gradas. Juvenna, querida, permitamos que el Inquisidor elimine las piezas superfluas del tablero».
languages.original_text: "The Drivestems shall observe this performance from the wings. Juvenna, my dear, let us allow the Inquisitor to clear any superfluous pieces from the board."

traits.locale_text: «Los Drivestem observarán este espectáculo desde las gradas. Juvenna, querida, permitamos que el Inquisidor elimine las piezas superfluas del tablero».

languages.text: "Die Drivestems werden dieses Schauspiel von den Flügeln verfolgen. Juvenna, meine Liebe, gestatten wir der Inquisition, alle überflüssigen Figuren vom Brett zu entfernen."
languages.original_text: "The Drivestems shall observe this performance from the wings. Juvenna, my dear, let us allow the Inquisitor to clear any superfluous pieces from the board."

traits.locale_text: "Die Drivestems werden dieses Schauspiel von den Flügeln verfolgen. Juvenna, meine Liebe, gestatten wir der Inquisition, alle überflüssigen Figuren vom Brett zu entfernen."

languages.text: 「ドライブステムは舞台袖からこの演技を観察する。ジュベナ、私の愛する娘よ、このボードから不要なものを取り除くために、インキサイトに許可を与えよう。」
languages.original_text: "The Drivestems shall observe this performance from the wings. Juvenna, my dear, let us allow the Inquisitor to clear any superfluous pieces from the board."

traits.locale_text: 「ドライブステムは舞台袖からこの演技を観察する。ジュベナ、私の愛する娘よ、このボードから不要なものを取り除くために、インキサイトに許可を与えよう。」
